mods.name: High-Flow Air Intake
mods.description: Upgrade the stock intake with a high-flow filter and larger diameter intake tube for better airflow to the N54 or N52 engine.
mods.installNotes: 20 minute install. Remove stock airbox and accordion hose. Attach new intake pipe to throttle body. Ensure MAF sensor is properly seated.

mods.name: Catback Exhaust
mods.description: Free up exhaust flow and unlock a sportier tone from the N54 twin-turbo or N52 inline-6 with a full cat-back exhaust system.
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from rear of catalytic converters. Hangs on factory mounts. No cutting required. 1–2 hour install on jack stands.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Lower the E90 by 25–35mm for improved handling and reduced body roll while maintaining a comfortable ride on stock dampers.
mods.installNotes: Spring compressor required. Replace all four corners simultaneously. Get alignment within 48 hours of install. May need to trim rear bump stops 10mm.

mods.name: N54 JB4 Piggyback Tune
mods.description: The JB4 piggyback module intercepts boost control signals to safely increase turbo boost pressure, adding 60–80hp to the N54 twin-turbo engine.
mods.partNumbers: Burger Motorsports JB4 N54, BMS Data Cable
mods.installNotes: Taps into the TMAP and boost solenoid harness. Start on Map 1 (low boost) for 1000 miles before moving to Map 5. Requires 93 octane. Pairs well with a downpipe.

mods.name: Upgraded Intercooler
mods.description: Replace the undersized stock intercooler on the N54 with a larger front-mount unit to reduce intake temps and prevent heat soak during spirited driving.
mods.installNotes: Remove front bumper and stock intercooler. New unit bolts to factory mounting points. Reuse stock charge pipes or upgrade simultaneously. 2–3 hour install.

mods.name: Catless Downpipes
mods.description: Remove the restrictive factory catalytic converters with catless or high-flow catted downpipes for massive turbo spool improvement and power gains.
mods.installNotes: Access from below on a lift. Soak bolts in penetrant overnight. O2 sensor spacers may be needed to prevent CEL. Gains 20–30hp when paired with a tune.

mods.name: N54 Single Turbo Conversion
mods.description: Replace the twin-turbo setup with a single, larger turbocharger for significantly higher power potential, capable of supporting 500–700hp builds.
mods.partNumbers: Vargas Turbo Technologies VTT Stage 2, Precision 6266 turbo kit
mods.installNotes: Requires custom exhaust manifold, upgraded fuel system (injectors + LPFP + HPFP), custom tune via MHD or Cobb. Upgraded clutch mandatory. Budget 20+ hours for install and tuning.

mods.name: Upgraded Brake Kit
mods.description: Install larger rotors and multi-piston calipers for dramatically improved braking performance, essential for track use or high-power builds.
mods.installNotes: Requires minimum 18-inch wheels for caliper clearance. Bleed system with DOT 4 racing fluid. Bed in pads with 10 moderate stops from 60mph.
